subcodes.first_line: O spiritual physician! Look not upon the severity of the maladies and the intensity of their inflammation, but be confident in the influence of the Most Great Name, which [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای طبیب روحانی نظر بشدت امراض و سورت التهاب منما مطمئن بتاثیر اسم اعظم باش که
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @power of faith; power of the spirit, @Greatest Name, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity
